description: Resolves an entity's AABB against solid tilemap cells (a tile whose properties flag solid:true): stops at walls/ceilings, lands on floors, and exposes contact flags on entity.state (__onGround/__onCeiling/__onWallL/__onWallR). A cell flagged oneWay:true is a one-way (pass-through) platform — solid on its top face only: a body lands on it from above but jumps up through it, runs past it sideways, and drops through it during move-platformer's drop-through window. Order it AFTER the velocity integrator. The terrain half of platformer collision.

solidProp.description: Tile-property flag marking a fully solid cell (default "solid").

oneWayProp.description: Tile-property flag marking a one-way (top-only) platform cell (default "oneWay").
